overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a bustling futuristic city street in Night City. The scene features towering buildings with neon signage, holographic advertisements, moderate vehicle traffic, and pedestrians, transitioning from a covered commercial walkway to a more open intersection area with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts

events.description: pedestrian with orange headwear passes close to camera on the left
pink futuristic sports car drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing the street and storefronts

notable_agents.action: person with orange headwear walking past the camera
pink sports car driving down the multi-lane street

entered.detail: tall building with prominent orange neon signage reading CALIENTE
building with green neon signage reading softsys
overhanging structure providing shade over the right side of the walkway
large floating digital advertisement displaying animated content
yellow structural bridge spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered commercial sidewalk in Night City, with the distinctive CALIENTE tower visible on the left and a protective canopy on the right. The camera moves forward past pedestrians and observes moderate traffic including a pink sports car, while holographic advertisements float above the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit stop area with advertising benches

events.description: slight navigation around pedestrians waiting at the bus stop
black sedan and purple car pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, navigating past other pedestrians near the bus stop area

notable_agents.action: person standing near the bus stop shelter
black sedan driving past on the street

entered.detail: transit bench with illuminated advertising display
red neon signage for Embers restaurant visible ahead
large digital screen showing animated character advertisement

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past a bus stop shelter with advertising displays, while the CALIENTE tower remains visible on the left. The Embers restaurant sign comes into view ahead, and the yellow overpass bridge grows larger as the camera approaches. Vehicles continue to pass by on the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area approaching the overpass

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into open sunlit area with palm trees
passing under the yellow overpass bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking into the more open intersection area, passing under the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: couple walking together on the right side of the path

entered.detail: group of palm trees in a raised planter bed
blue street signs mounted on poles
modern reflective glass building with geometric facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the covered walkway into a bright, open plaza area with palm trees and modern glass architecture. The camera passes underneath the yellow overpass bridge, leaving the dense commercial signage behind as the environment opens up to reveal distant mountain views and more natural vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dense, covered commercial corridor into a bright, open urban plaza. It begins on a sheltered sidewalk beneath a protective canopy, moving past pedestrians and a pink sports car while the CALIENTE tower looms to the left and holographic advertisements float overhead. As the camera advances, the scene shifts past a bus stop shelter and the Embers restaurant sign, with a massive yellow overpass bridge gradually growing larger in the field of view. The environment then opens up as the camera passes underneath the bridge, leaving the crowded signage behind to reveal a sunlit plaza featuring palm trees and modern glass architecture. Finally, the view expands further to reveal distant mountains and natural vegetation, completing the transition from the claustrophobic city street to an airy intersection.
